data.body: Implementation complete. Repointed signing.sign_manifest to mint rebar.opcert.v1 DSSE op-certs; extracted op-cert machinery to src/rebar/_opcert_signing.py (module-size cap). Added verify_attestation_record shape-aware wrapper; reducer folds principal; close-gate + claim-gate degrade name OpenSSH>=8.9; schemas+types+SignResultOut admit envelope shape; gitignore .opcert-key(.pub); env-vars.md regen. New tests: tests/unit/test_opcert_producer_seam_8d8e.py (24). Updated existing HMAC-seam tests to op-cert contract: test_signature.py, test_opcert_storage_heldout.py, test_identity_ts3_117b_heldout enum. lint+typecheck green; targeted 294 tests green. Full suite running. Pre-existing unrelated failure: test_resolve_symbol_confirms_third_party_module (yaml installed in worktree .venv classifies repo-local; not my code).
